subject: [PATCH 0/8 RFC] mm/memcontrol, page_counter: move stock from mem_cgroup to page_counter

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the impact of the change on cgroup v1 and suggested further testing to ensure the new design doesn't introduce performance regressions.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Provided feedback on the patch series, suggesting improvements to the documentation and code organization.

reviews.author: Joshua Hahn
reviews.summary: Responded to reviewer comments, addressing concerns and providing additional information on the patch series.

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch series moves the per-cpu stock from mem_cgroup to page_counter, addressing limitations in the current design such as slot traversal and css refcounting. The change also introduces independent stock management for cgroup v1 memsw page_counter.
